hooks.command: if [ ! -f /tmp/tests-passed ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Tests must pass before committing. Run npm test first. Touch /tmp/tests-passed only after all tests pass.' && exit 2; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q '\.env$\|\.env\.'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit .env files directly. Update .env.example for documentation. Set real values in your deployment environment or shell.' && exit 2; fi
FILES=$(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' '\n' | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' | tr '\n' ' '); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then npx prettier --write $FILES 2>/dev/null || true; fi
FILES=$(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' '\n' | grep -E '\.tsx?$'); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 || true; fi

echo '=== Z-BOOKS SESSION CONTEXT ===' && echo '' && echo 'Git status:' && git status --short 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo 'Recent commits:' && git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo 'Current branch:' && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo 'Build status:' && head -20 BUILD_STATUS.md 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo 'Open issues:' && grep -r 'TODO\|FIXME\|HACK' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' -h 2>/dev/null | head -8 || true
